name: Rocky Road Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Half and half or light cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the half and half into a large bowl.
2. Add the chocolate pudding mixture to the bowl with the half and half.
3. Beat everything together until well blended, about 1 minute.
4. Let the mixture stand for 5 minutes.
5. Gently fold in the whipped topping, chocolate chips, marshmallows, and nuts.
6. Spoon the mixture into the prepared pie crust.
7. Freeze the pie for at least 6 hours or overnight to set firmly.
8. Before serving, remove the pie from the freezer and let it stand for about 10 minutes to soften.
9. Store any leftover pie in the freezer.
